executive_summary: ROSClaw RealSense D405 perception-only MVP loop repaired across milestones A–I. All product layers above librealsense2/pyrealsense2 are now wired: MCP install, body init, sandbox policy, skills, practice recording, provider normalization, dashboard, memory/how/know, doctor/bench.

issues_closed.title: Hub requires login; mcp list times out with no registry
issues_closed.evidence: mcp list defaults to offline mode when ROSCLAW_MCP_HUB is unset; built-in index returns instantly

issues_closed.title: mcp install cannot install external MCPs without active registry
issues_closed.evidence: --from-git and --local-path installers implemented; local-path path tested, git path requires network

issues_closed.title: No realsense-d405 e-URDF profile
issues_closed.evidence: Profiles added under e-urdf-zoo/realsense_d405/, realsense_d435i/, realsense_dual/

issues_closed.title: Sandbox check fails for perception-only bodies
issues_closed.evidence: cmd_sandbox_check resolves aliases and blocks actuator actions, allows sensor capture

issues_closed.title: Practice records zero events and still reports SUCCESS
issues_closed.evidence: PracticeCoordinator._stop_session returns FAILED with zero_events label when event_count == 0

issues_closed.title: Dashboard has no RealSense or practice-episode endpoints
issues_closed.evidence: FastAPI routes added for practice episodes, realsense status, latest frame, safe artifact serving, and /realsense HTML page

issues_closed.title: memory ingest / how advise / know compile missing; memory query returns mock data
issues_closed.evidence: CLI subcommands added; memory query defaults to real evidence, --demo restores mock fallback

issues_closed.title: doctor and bench realsense missing
issues_closed.evidence: doctor --realsense and bench realsense implemented with pyrealsense2 / rs-data-collect backends

issues_closed.title: RealSense skill not discoverable / executable
issues_closed.evidence: Builtin skill registry with realsense_capture_rgbd and scene_risk_scan; rosclaw skill search/invoke wired

issues_closed.title: Provider CLI lacks image-path normalized output

A.title: MCP onboarding (public-git, local-path, offline list)
key_behaviors: Built-in fallback index for librealsense-mcp and realsense-ros-mcp

B.title: RealSense e-URDF / body
key_behaviors: Legacy single-body resolution by body.yaml id

D.title: Skill search / install / run + RealSense capture skill

E.title: Provider image call + result normalization
key_behaviors: provider call --image PATH --capability CAP --provider NAME --output DIR

H.title: Memory / How / Know
key_behaviors: memory query real evidence by default; --demo for mock

cli_regression.notes: Implementation correct; no outbound GitHub access

cli_regression.command: rosclaw practice run --robot d405_lab_01 --skill realsense_capture_rgbd --provider cosmos-reason2-lan --output-root /tmp/episode --json
cli_regression.notes: Episode recorded as FAILED with zero_events

cli_regression.command: rosclaw memory query "RealSense D405 RGB-D capture"

cli_regression.notes: Structured checks; exits 1 because stack absent

unit_tests.pre_existing_failures: Legacy async tests fail due to missing pytest-asyncio plugin; unrelated to MVP changes

known_limitations: No outbound network access prevents mcp install --from-git end-to-end validation
No RealSense hardware / pyrealsense2 on test machine; skill and bench report capture errors
ROS2 stack absent; doctor ROS2 checks report FAIL/WARN
Legacy single-body workspace requires body ID to match body.yaml
Dashboard --open detaches under harness background task; interactive use keeps server alive
next_steps: Validate on real Jetson + D405 hardware with librealsense-mcp installed
Run mcp install --from-git in environment with outbound GitHub access
Add pytest-asyncio to dev dependencies and triage legacy async failures
Extend realsense-ros-mcp integration when ROS2 stack is available
